topicCache.text: If you could travel anywhere in the world, where would you go and what would you hope to experience or achieve?
What are some common societal pressures that people face, and how can we work to mitigate their negative effects?
How do you think technology will continue to evolve in the next decade, and what implications might this have for humanity?
What does it mean to be a responsible global citizen, and what actions can we take to make a positive impact?
In what ways can learning a new language enrich our lives, and what challenges might we face in the process?
What are some key factors that contribute to a person's overall happiness, and how can we incorporate them into our daily lives?
How can we balance the need for economic growth with the importance of protecting the environment?
What are some of the most significant cultural differences you've encountered, and how have they influenced your perspective?
If you could go back in time and give advice to your younger self, what would it be and why?
In what ways can mindfulness and self-reflection contribute to personal growth, and how can we make them a part of our daily routine?
What are some common myths or misconceptions about different cultures, and how can we work to dispel them?
How can we use our unique skills and talents to make a positive impact in our communities?
What role does creativity play in our lives, and how can we nurture it to achieve our goals?
What are some of the most pressing global issues of our time, and how can we contribute to finding solutions?
If you could switch lives with someone for a day, who would it be and what do you think you would learn from the experience?
How can we effectively communicate across cultural and linguistic boundaries, and what are some common pitfalls to avoid?
What are some ways in which we can cultivate empathy and understanding in our interactions with others?

intermediate.text: By next year, I will have been living in this city for five years.
The teacher asked the students to write a short essay about their summer vacation.
Although it was raining, we still went to the park.
The company will have to reduce its staff if it wants to survive.
If I won the lottery, I would buy a house on the beach.
The concert was canceled due to the bad weather.
The new policy has been implemented to reduce traffic congestion.
The tourists got lost in the city because they didn't have a map.
The student was disappointed when he didn't get the scholarship.
The weather forecast says it will rain tomorrow, so take an umbrella.
The hotel room was very small, but it had a great view of the city.
The company is looking for someone who speaks fluent English and Spanish.
The movie was so boring that I fell asleep halfway through.
The school will be closed for the next two weeks due to the holidays.
If I had more free time, I would learn how to play the guitar.
The city is hosting a festival to celebrate its 500th anniversary.
The new smartphone is much faster and more powerful than the old one.
The teacher gave the students a lot of homework to do over the weekend.
The company has decided to expand its business to Asia.
The book was so interesting that I read it in one day.
The student was happy when he finally understood the difficult math concept.
The hotel staff were very friendly and helpful during our stay.
The weather was perfect for the wedding, sunny and not too hot.
The city has a lot of traffic, but the public transportation system is very good.
The company is planning to launch a new product next month.
The tourists were amazed by the beauty of the ancient ruins.
The student was sad when he said goodbye to his friends on the last day of school.
The city has a lot of parks and green spaces where people can relax.
The teacher asked the students to work in groups to complete the project.
The new employee was given a lot of responsibility from the start.
The company has a very good reputation for treating its employees well.
The student was proud of himself when he finally finished the difficult project.
The city is known for its vibrant cultural scene and many museums.
The teacher encouraged the students to ask questions and participate in class.
The company is trying to reduce its carbon footprint by using renewable energy.
The student was relieved when he finally received his exam results and had passed.
